title: Grilled Flaky Toor Dal Crumble
description: A sweet, flaky dish for a solo dinner that is jain-friendly and features toor dal grilled over low heat.

ingredients.name: 1 cup toor dal (split yellow split peas)

instructions: Drain and rinse the soaked toor dal. In a large bowl, mix the drained toor dal with sugar and salt.
Add lemon juice and toss until all pieces are well coated with the mixture.
Place on a tray lined with parchment paper and sprinkle 5 tbsp of oil evenly over the surface of the dal.
Roast in preheated oven for about 15-20 minutes, or until golden brown. Keep an eye to prevent burning.
Garnish with fresh cilantro leaves before serving.
